AI-powered Quizy generation that turns complex documents into engaging, scenario-based challenges. Stop boring fill-in-the-blanks; start mastering your domain through action.

Platform Capabilities

Enterprise-Grade Features

🧠

Adaptive Intelligence

Advanced algorithms analyze learning patterns and adjust difficulty in real-time to optimize retention.

Learn more →
📄

PDF Processing

Upload academic papers, medical journals, textbooks. All processing stays in your browser — zero tracking.

Learn more →
✨

15+ Unique Quizzes

Generate dozens of unique assessments from a single document. Each quiz follows a logical progression.

Learn more →
🛡️

Anti-Plagiarism

Same core concepts, unique questions. Varied answer choices per user ensure assessment integrity.

Learn more →
📊

Enterprise Analytics

Track performance, identify knowledge gaps, and measure improvement with institutional reporting.

Learn more →
💡

Intelligent Feedback

Every answer includes detailed scientific explanations and direct links to curated learning resources.

Learn more →
📚

Evidence-Based

Built on proven methodologies like Retrieval Practice and Spaced Repetition for maximum efficiency.

Learn more →
👥

Collab Hub

Share study materials within your research group while maintaining complete assessment uniqueness.

Learn more →
📜

Curated Mastery

Generate professional certifications and performance reports for your development archive.

Learn more →
Research-Backed Approach

Built on Learning Science

✓ Educational Foundation

  • Spaced Repetition (Ebbinghaus, 1885)
  • Active Recall (Karpicke & Roediger, 2008)
  • Retrieval Practice
  • Cognitive Load Theory
  • Bloom's Taxonomy
  • Adaptive Learning

▸ Technical Implementation

  • Natural Language Processing
  • TF-IDF Keyword Extraction
  • Semantic Analysis
  • Difficulty Calibration
  • Performance Prediction
  • Real-time Adaptation
